title: PaJo and Friends' SMP World Pack
description: A lightweight, server-oriented modpack with the goal to connect players using Voice Chat and QOL optimization mods.
body: A vanilla+ modpack focused on optimization and player interactivity, this modpack is designed for use on vanilla+ servers. There are no added blocks or items, and the primary mods used are Sodium, Lithium, SkinShuffle, Simple Voice Chat, and Zoomify.
